name: Festive Cookies 'n' Mint Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Hershey's cookies 'n' mint chocolate bar (7 oz., broken into pieces and divided)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium microwave-safe bowl, place marshmallows and milk. Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 1 minute or until marshmallows are melted and the mixture is smooth when stirred. Cool completely.
2. Meanwhile, in a small microwave-safe bowl, place half of the candy pieces and 2 tablespoons whipping cream. Microwave at HIGH for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes or just until chocolate is melted when stirred; spread over the bottom of the crumb crust.
3. In a small bowl, beat remaining whipping cream until stiff. Fold into marshmallow mixture. Finely chop the remaining candy bar pieces and fold in with food coloring, if desired. Spread over the top of the chocolate layer. Cover; refrigerate until firm. Garnish as desired. Serve 6 to 8 servings.
